title: 有馬記念の後に・このキングにして

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, there you have it! The Arima Kinen is mine!
And with it, I finish the year in the starring role!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Your king reigns supreme! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Praise me more and more! Raise your voice
high and laud my grand achievement!
After ten minutes of this...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! ♪ Who's the king of Arima
Kineeen? ♪

choice_data_list: You'll be the star of tonight's concert too!
You'll be the star of tonight's concert too!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wait, that's right! I have to get ready for the concert!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For I am King Halo! I took center stage during the
Arima Kinen, so I'll take center stage in the
performance!

With that said, King Halo turns and cheerfully
skips away.

The racecourse staff sends me their thanks as I
return to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You can come in, Trainer.
Creak...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm perfect! More perfect than ever!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well then, I'll be off to wait in the wi—
Buzz, buzz.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh, someone's calling me now? Sigh... Don't they realize what time it is?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, of course it's her. Oh, well, this should
only take a second.
Beep.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Mother? I'm about to give a performance,
you know.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think you'd go so far as to even win the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. What are you so surprised about? It was a
well-deserved victory.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm King Halo, you know. Your daughter, the
first-rate Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And before you know it, everyone will remember
you as simply "King Halo's mother."

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you think you can surpass me now?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right. And perhaps someday I'll even grant
you the honor of wearing your brand's signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: You really are foolish.
Knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
King, it's time to go! The performance starts in
five minutes!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Already?! Are you serious?! Trainer, take this!
Whap!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Nice catch!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now, I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: See you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
My daughter has been blessed with great rivals
and a great trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I have to admit, she sounds like she's enjoying
herself, running out there.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
It seems everything I've done until now was
unnecessary.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for any inconvenience she may cause,
but please continue to watch over her.
Click... Beep...

Should I say like mother, like daughter? Or like
daughter, like mother?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let's make it a night to remember! Come
on, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yup, yup. Hope you're ready to pick up my slack.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's goes without saying! Let's give it our
all! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh! King, you better not disappoint on center
stage!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I wonder if I'll be able to keep up with
everyone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So everyone still acts this way even before going
on stage.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess we are who we are.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: All right, it's showtime everyone! Ready?

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

Their separate voices, once at odds with each
other, now come together in harmony to ring
throughout the venue.

It goes without saying, but their winning concert
will be remembered for a long time to come.
